title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Kale Consultants family as a Backend Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Kale Consultants:
Kale Consultants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants!
